ctaBody: If you're a founder who wants to do this right, we have the network and expertise to make it happen.
ctaFounderLabel: Apply to join as a founder
heroIntro: Rellia Health is a virtual incubator dedicated to accelerating the commercialization of digital health solutions that matter.

children.text: Empowering the next generation of health tech.

missionParagraphs: The healthcare industry is notoriously difficult to navigate. Brilliant founders often struggle not because their ideas lack merit, but because they are trying to figure it out without the right people around them.

At Rellia, we meet health tech founders where they are, surrounding them with deep industry expertise and individualized support so that the complexities of healthcare innovation feel less overwhelming. Because when founders have the right people in their corner, meaningful innovation actually reaches the patients who need it.

seo.metaDescription: Learn how Rellia Health brings together operators, investors, and clinical leaders to scale solutions that matter for patients and health systems.
seo.ogDescription: Learn how Rellia Health brings together operators, investors, and clinical leaders to scale solutions that matter for patients and health systems.

team.bio: Regulatory and Quality Management executive specializing in global market entry strategy and FDA/Health Canada submissions for SaMD and digital health companies.
team.name: Megan Kane

team.bio: Deena brings startup experience in the health tech space and leverages her experience to lead our program development and management
team.name: Deena Al-Sammak

team.bio: A Chemical Engineer & digital health founder, Khali blends her technical background with a deep commitment to human-centred design to ensure Rellia’s ecosystem is as intuitive as it is impactful.
team.name: Khali Abdi

team.bio: With a decade of experience embedded in early-stage health companies, Priyanka converts her deep regulatory and quality expertise into operational momentum, turning complexity into the strategic edge that moves teams forward.
team.name: Priyanka Ramjagsingh

team.bio: A digital health founder herself, Kelly plans and executes content creation to boost engagement and showcase Rellia's growing network.
team.name: Kelly Hu

teamSubtitle: Health tech insiders who saw a better way, so they built it. Just like you did.

values.description: Building in health tech is hard enough. Everyone here genuinely wants to see you succeed, and that makes all the difference.
values.title: Generous

values.description: Generic startup guidance does not work in healthcare. Everything we offer is built around the specific realities of health tech commercialization.
values.title: Healthcare-Specific

values.description: Great ideas and great mentors are not concentrated in one city. Rellia is a virtual community, and that breadth makes it stronger.
values.title: Globally Connected

values.description: You don't need more learning, you need more things accomplished. We focus on helping you achieve the outcomes that actually move your business forward.
values.title: Radically Practical
